reference: Hello there, I have been suffering from acne for three years since I was sixteen, and recently I have used a product that cleared most of them, but I have been left with scars. I don't want to go to a dermatologist for skin peeling or anything since it would be expensive, so is there another way I could remove these deep scars naturally and inexpensively?
text: Hello there. I have been suffering from acne for three years since I was sixteen, and recently I have used a product that cleared most of them, but I have been left with scars. I don't want to go to a dermatologist for skin healing or anything since it would be expensive. So, is there another way I could remove these deep scars naturally and inexpensively?
